title: Normalize or document legacy timestamp formats
description: Review legacy ledger records that use UTC-Z timestamps while newer records use local offset timestamps. Decide whether to normalize old records or explicitly document compatibility. If normalizing, preserve semantic instants and avoid touching unrelated fields.
acceptance: All timestamp records are reviewed for mixed UTC-Z and local-offset formatting.
Either legacy timestamps are normalized to the current convention or the compatibility decision is documented in docs/roadmap.md or an ADR.
No unrelated ledger fields are changed during normalization.
waystation validate is clean after the change.
bun test, typecheck, biome check, and rebuilt binary smoke checks are green if code changes are made.
notes: This was the only remaining not-yet-phased backlog item. Treat record churn carefully because many generated views depend on ledger timestamps.
